This is inconsistent and may have been patched."}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"p-4 rounded-lg bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800","children":[["$","h3",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-emerald-400 mb-1","children":"Duplication via Co-op"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-zinc-300 text-sm","children":"In online co-op, both players grabbing the same box simultaneously has reportedly caused item duplication.
